div1.entryFree:
Shoot, subst. 1) the discharge of a missile: end thy ill aim before thy s. be ended, Lucr. 579. where you may make the fairest s. LLL IV, 1, 10. LLL IV, 1, 10 LLL IV, 1, 10 H4B III, 2, 49. H6C III, 1, 7. at a s. == at one s. Hml. V, 2, 377 (Qq shot).
2) a young branch: thou wantest a rough pash and the --s I have, Wint. I, 2, 128.
